title: Rebuild love letter page from provided HTML code

requirements.text: Replace the current frontend app with a faithful React/Tailwind implementation of the provided HTML design. The page must display a dark background (#1a1a1a), four floating emoji elements (❤️, ✨, 🕊️, 🌹) that animate upward with a float keyframe, a centered parchment-style letter container (max-width 650px, background #fdfcf0, gold border #d4af37, box-shadow, fadeIn animation), a Dancing Script header reading 'To my dearest Priya (Cutee) 📜✨' in maroon (#800000) with a gold double bottom border, the full letter body text in EB Garamond with justified alignment and line-height 1.9, inline highlighted spans styled italic/bold/maroon with wavy gold underline for the phrases 'Please don't misunderstand my intentions;' and 'grace note in my life;', a right-aligned cursive footer reading 'Always yours, ❤️', and a centered maroon radial-gradient wax seal circle with gold letter 'P'. Import Dancing Script, Playfair Display, and EB Garamond from Google Fonts. Apply responsive styles reducing padding and font sizes on screens below 480px.

quotes: Not the draft make a new one with the new code i have provided to you

acceptanceCriteria: Four floating emoji elements (❤️, ✨, 🕊️, 🌹) animate upward with staggered delays
Letter container is centered, has a cream parchment background (#fdfcf0), gold border (#d4af37), and fades in on load
Header reads 'To my dearest Priya (Cutee) 📜✨' in Dancing Script, maroon color, with a gold double-line bottom border
All five letter paragraphs are rendered in full with correct emoji and line breaks
The phrases 'Please don't misunderstand my intentions;' and 'grace note in my life;' are styled italic, bold, maroon, with wavy gold underline
Footer reads 'Always yours, ❤️' right-aligned in Dancing Script
Wax seal is a 70×70px maroon radial-gradient circle displaying gold letter 'P'
On screens narrower than 480px, padding reduces and font sizes scale down as specified

constraints: Do not reuse or modify the existing envelope/letter animation components — build fresh components matching the provided HTML design exactly
Do not include the envelope open interaction or star background from the previous version
All letter text content must match the provided HTML verbatim
nonGoals: Retaining any existing envelope animation, SealButton, StarBackground, or Envelope components
